summary: Tested contractor contact reveal feature end-to-end. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: all key UI states verified via Playwright — pending+hidden, reveal button, after-reveal with Paid Reveal badge, and success toast.
critical_code_review_comments: The pending-masking logic at user_routes.py line 202 applies masking if `viewer_is_free OR mask_for_pending`. This means even FREE plan crew (not applied to job) get phone/email hidden when viewing any contractor. This is probably intentional (subscription gate) but worth confirming it's desired behavior.
Backend test crew2 (0a40a35e) now has paid_reveal persisted on job 6b115c8d after test_reveal_new_crew_flow ran. Test cleanup not implemented. Not a code issue, but test data is now modified.
seed_data_creation: Applied crew4 (596d028e) and crew5 (46ff3266) to job 6b115c8d as pending. crew4 and crew2 now have paid_reveals on this job.
